patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -1,75 +1,108 @@
+// styles.js
 import { makeStyles } from '@material-ui/core/styles';
 
 export default makeStyles((theme) => ({
+  // Paper / Card chính
   paper: {
-    marginTop: theme.spacing(8),
+    marginTop: theme.spacing(6),
     display: 'flex',
     flexDirection: 'column',
     alignItems: 'center',
-    padding: theme.spacing(4),
-    borderRadius: '16px',
+    padding: theme.spacing(5),
+    borderRadius: '20px',
     background: '#ffffff',
-    boxShadow: '0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)',
+    boxShadow: '0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)',
     transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
     '&:hover': {
-      boxShadow: '0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.16)',
+      boxShadow: '0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)',
     },
   },
+
+  // Avatar icon
   avatar: {
     margin: theme.spacing(1),
-    backgroundColor: '#3f51b5',
-    width: theme.spacing(7),
-    height: theme.spacing(7),
+    backgroundColor: '#4f46e5',
+    width: theme.spacing(8),
+    height: theme.spacing(8),
+    boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)',
   },
+
+  // Form container
   form: {
-    width: '100%', 
+    width: '100%',
     marginTop: theme.spacing(3),
   },
+
+  // Input fields
+  input: {
+    '& .MuiOutlinedInput-root': {
+      borderRadius: '12px',
+      backgroundColor: '#f9fafc',
+      '&:hover fieldset': {
+        borderColor: '#4f46e5',
+      },
+      '&.Mui-focused fieldset': {
+        borderColor: '#6366f1',
+        borderWidth: '2px',
+      },
+    },
+    '& .MuiInputLabel-root': {
+      color: '#555',
+      fontWeight: 500,
+    },
+  },
+
+  // Sign In / Sign Up button
   submit: {
     margin: theme.spacing(3, 0, 2),
     textTransform: 'none',
     fontWeight: 600,
     fontSize: '1rem',
-    padding: '10px 0',
-    borderRadius: '12px',
-    background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #3f51b5 0%, #6573c3 100%)',
+    padding: '12px 0',
+    borderRadius: '14px',
+    background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5 0%, #6366f1 100%)',
     color: '#fff',
-    boxShadow: '0 6px 16px rgba(63,81,181,0.3)',
+    boxShadow: '0 8px 20px rgba(79,70,229,0.3)',
     transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
     '&:hover': {
-      background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #6573c3 0%, #3f51b5 100%)',
-      boxShadow: '0 8px 20px rgba(63,81,181,0.4)',
+      background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #6366f1 0%, #4f46e5 100%)',
+      boxShadow: '0 12px 28px rgba(79,70,229,0.4)',
       transform: 'translateY(-2px)',
     },
   },
+
+  // Google Sign In button
   googleButton: {
     marginTop: theme.spacing(1),
     marginBottom: theme.spacing(2),
     width: '100%',
-    borderRadius: '12px',
-    boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)',
+    borderRadius: '14px',
+    boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)',
     transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
     '&:hover': {
-      boxShadow: '0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)',
+      boxShadow: '0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)',
       transform: 'translateY(-1px)',
     },
   },
-  input: {
-    '& .MuiOutlinedInput-root': {
-      borderRadius: '10px',
-      backgroundColor: '#fafafa',
-      transition: 'all 0.25s ease',
-      '&:hover fieldset': {
-        borderColor: '#3f51b5',
-      },
-      '&.Mui-focused fieldset': {
-        borderColor: '#6573c3',
-        borderWidth: '2px',
-      },
+
+  // Typography / Heading
+  heading: {
+    fontWeight: 700,
+    fontSize: '1.8rem',
+    color: '#4f46e5',
+    textAlign: 'center',
+    marginBottom: theme.spacing(2),
+  },
+
+  // Small switch mode text
+  switchMode: {
+    textTransform: 'none',
+    fontWeight: 500,
+    fontSize: '0.9rem',
+    color: '#555',
+    '&:hover': {
+      color: '#4f46e5',
+      backgroundColor: 'transparent',
     },
-    '& .MuiInputLabel-root': {
-      color: '#555',
-      fontWeight: 500,
-    },
   },
 }));
\ No newline at end of file
